subparts.text: What is scaffolding? Why do we use stubs and drivers during unit testing?
Write a program to determine whether a number is even or odd. Draw the program graph and DD path graph. Find the independent paths.
Show with the help of an example that a very high level of statement coverage does not mean that the program is defect-free.
Explain SDD verification used in Software testing.
Write a program to add two digit integers. Can we test the program completely? If so, how many test cases are required?
What are the limitations of testing? Who should do the testing of the software? What should we test? Explain the areas which should be focused on during testing.
What are the various levels of testing? Explain the objectives of every level. Who should do testing at every level and why?
Explain the Static and Dynamic testing.

questions.question_text: Consider the program to find the addition of three numbersThe input is a triple of positive integers and values are from interval [100,500]. Generate boundary, robust and worst-case test cases. Explain limitations of Boundary Values Analysis Testing

Differentiate between black box and white box testing. Consider a program to find the smallest number amongst three numbers. Generate test cases using one black box testing and one white box testing technique.

subparts.text: Explain an algorithm in regression testing for the prioritization of test cases
How is object oriented testing different from procedural testing?.
Explain the various steps of the regression testing process and Compare regression testing with development testing
What is class testing? What are various issues related to class testing?
Describe various verification methods and differentiate between verification and validation.
Explain the issues which must be addressed by the SRS document checklist.
What is debugging? Explain any two debugging techniques
What should we measure during testing? Explain different Metrics used in Testing.
